channel.title: Protoc on 流动
channel.description: Recent content in Protoc on 流动

item.title: 解决 "undeclared name: any (requires version go1.18 or later)" 编译错误
item.description: $ go install google.golang.org/protobuf/cmd/protoc-gen-go@latest $ $ protoc-gen-go --version protoc-gen-go v1.34.2 $ $ sh make.sh user.pb.go:123:45: undeclared name: any (requires version go1.18 or later) $ 流水线编译报错，其中make.sh文件代码： ... protoc -I=./ --proto_path=./ --go_out=./ --go_opt=paths=source_relative user.proto ... go build 同样的代码在本机编译就没问题
